---
title: "encap_on"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(here)
```

```{r}
encap_on <- readRDS(here("ValidationData", "encap_on.rds"))
```

*Check ob AOI Kombi existiert*  
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

check_full_3way <- function(data, var1, var2, aoi = "AOI") {
  data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      across(all_of(c(aoi, var1, var2)), as.factor)
    )

  all_combos <- expand_grid(
    !!rlang::sym(aoi) := levels(data[[aoi]]),
    !!rlang::sym(var1) := levels(data[[var1]]),
    !!rlang::sym(var2) := levels(data[[var2]])
  )

  observed <- data %>%
    count(
      !!rlang::sym(aoi),
      !!rlang::sym(var1),
      !!rlang::sym(var2),
      name = "n"
    )

  combo_check <- all_combos %>%
    left_join(observed, by = c(aoi, var1, var2)) %>%
    mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0)) %>%
    arrange(
      !!rlang::sym(aoi),
      !!rlang::sym(var1),
      !!rlang::sym(var2)
    )

  missing_combos <- combo_check %>%
    filter(n == 0)

  per_aoi_summary <- combo_check %>%
    group_by(!!rlang::sym(aoi)) %>%
    summarise(
      all_var1_var2_combos_present = all(n > 0),
      n_missing = sum(n == 0),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    combo_check = combo_check,
    missing_combos = missing_combos,
    per_aoi_summary = per_aoi_summary
  )
}
res <- check_full_3way(
  data = encap_on,
  var1 = "var1",
  var2 = "var2",
  aoi = "AOI"
)

res$combo_check
res$missing_combos
res$per_aoi_summary
```


TRT: mod_trt <- glmmTMB( TRT ~ var1 * var2*AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant), data = encap_on, family = Gamma(link = "log") )
RRT: mod_rrt <- glmmTMB( RRT ~ var1 * var2*AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant), ziformula = ~ 
var1 * var2*AOI + nLetters, data = encap_on, family = ziGamma(link = "log") )

*TRT: Full Data Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_fit_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_obs_metric = 0L,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_obs_metric = length(obs),
    rmse_in_sample = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae_in_sample = mean(abs(err)),
    bias_in_sample = mean(err),
    cor_obs_pred = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(obs, pred))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, nLetters, Participant, Topic, AOI, aggr_level, var1, var2
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_fullfit_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "AOI", "aggr_level",
    "var1", "var2"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO aggr_level
# Mehrere AOIs:
#   TRT ~ var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + ...
# Eine AOI:
#   TRT ~ var1 * var2 + nLetters + ...
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on <- function(response = "TRT",
                                          n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGN-CHECKS
# =========================================================

check_cells <- function(df, var, aoi = "AOI") {
  aoi_levels <- levels(df[[aoi]])
  var_levels <- levels(df[[var]])

  obs <- df %>%
    dplyr::count(.data[[aoi]], .data[[var]], name = "n")

  full_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    AOI__tmp = aoi_levels,
    VAR__tmp = var_levels
  ) %>%
    rename(!!aoi := AOI__tmp, !!var := VAR__tmp)

  full_grid %>%
    left_join(obs, by = c(aoi, var)) %>%
    mutate(
      n = tidyr::replace_na(n, 0L),
      present = n > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(.data[[aoi]], .data[[var]])
}

summarise_cell_check <- function(cell_tbl, var_name) {
  tibble(
    factor_name = var_name,
    n_cells_total = nrow(cell_tbl),
    n_cells_present = sum(cell_tbl$present),
    n_cells_missing = sum(!cell_tbl$present),
    missing_cells = if (sum(!cell_tbl$present) == 0) {
      NA_character_
    } else {
      paste0(
        cell_tbl %>%
          dplyr::filter(!present) %>%
          transmute(txt = paste0(AOI, " x ", .data[[var_name]])) %>%
          pull(txt),
        collapse = "; "
      )
    }
  )
}

within_aoi_variation <- function(df, var, aoi = "AOI") {
  df %>%
    group_by(.data[[aoi]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n_levels = n_distinct(.data[[var]]),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      factor_name = var,
      has_variation = n_levels >= 2
    ) %>%
    rename(AOI = .data[[aoi]])
}

summarise_within_aoi_variation <- function(var_tbl, var_name) {
  tibble(
    factor_name = var_name,
    n_aoi_total = nrow(var_tbl),
    n_aoi_without_variation = sum(!var_tbl$has_variation),
    aoi_without_variation = if (sum(!var_tbl$has_variation) == 0) {
      NA_character_
    } else {
      paste(var_tbl$AOI[!var_tbl$has_variation], collapse = "; ")
    }
  )
}

check_cells_joint <- function(df, vars = c("var1", "var2"), aoi = "AOI") {
  stopifnot(length(vars) == 2)

  aoi_levels <- levels(df[[aoi]])
  v1_levels  <- levels(df[[vars[1]]])
  v2_levels  <- levels(df[[vars[2]]])

  obs <- df %>%
    dplyr::count(.data[[aoi]], .data[[vars[1]]], .data[[vars[2]]], name = "n")

  full_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    AOI__tmp = aoi_levels,
    V1__tmp  = v1_levels,
    V2__tmp  = v2_levels
  ) %>%
    rename(
      !!aoi := AOI__tmp,
      !!vars[1] := V1__tmp,
      !!vars[2] := V2__tmp
    )

  full_grid %>%
    left_join(obs, by = c(aoi, vars)) %>%
    mutate(
      n = tidyr::replace_na(n, 0L),
      present = n > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(.data[[aoi]], .data[[vars[1]]], .data[[vars[2]]])
}

summarise_joint_cell_check <- function(cell_tbl, vars = c("var1", "var2")) {
  tibble(
    factor_name = paste(vars, collapse = ":"),
    n_cells_total = nrow(cell_tbl),
    n_cells_present = sum(cell_tbl$present),
    n_cells_missing = sum(!cell_tbl$present),
    missing_cells = if (sum(!cell_tbl$present) == 0) {
      NA_character_
    } else {
      paste0(
        cell_tbl %>%
          dplyr::filter(!present) %>%
          transmute(txt = paste0(AOI, " x ", .data[[vars[1]]], " x ", .data[[vars[2]]])) %>%
          pull(txt),
        collapse = "; "
      )
    }
  )
}

inspect_design_structure_encap_on <- function(df) {
  cell_var1 <- check_cells(df, "var1")
  cell_var2 <- check_cells(df, "var2")
  cell_joint <- check_cells_joint(df, c("var1", "var2"))

  cell_summary <- bind_rows(
    summarise_cell_check(cell_var1, "var1"),
    summarise_cell_check(cell_var2, "var2"),
    summarise_joint_cell_check(cell_joint, c("var1", "var2"))
  )

  var_var1 <- within_aoi_variation(df, "var1")
  var_var2 <- within_aoi_variation(df, "var2")

  variation_summary <- bind_rows(
    summarise_within_aoi_variation(var_var1, "var1"),
    summarise_within_aoi_variation(var_var2, "var2")
  )

  missing_cells_any <- any(cell_summary$n_cells_missing > 0)
  no_variation_any  <- any(variation_summary$n_aoi_without_variation > 0)

  tibble(
    design_missing_cells_any = missing_cells_any,
    design_no_variation_any = no_variation_any,
    design_missing_var1_cells = cell_summary$missing_cells[cell_summary$factor_name == "var1"],
    design_missing_var2_cells = cell_summary$missing_cells[cell_summary$factor_name == "var2"],
    design_missing_var1_var2_cells = cell_summary$missing_cells[cell_summary$factor_name == "var1:var2"],
    design_aoi_without_var1_variation = variation_summary$aoi_without_variation[variation_summary$factor_name == "var1"],
    design_aoi_without_var2_variation = variation_summary$aoi_without_variation[variation_summary$factor_name == "var2"]
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on <- function(df, formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI),
    n_distinct_var1 = dplyr::n_distinct(df$var1),
    n_distinct_var2 = dplyr::n_distinct(df$var2),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                      fit_warning_text,
                                      fit_message_text,
                                      fit_error,
                                      fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                      fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                      design_missing_cells_any,
                                      design_no_variation_any) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) & (design_missing_cells_any | design_no_variation_any) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "design_driven_rank_deficiency_with_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) & (design_missing_cells_any | design_no_variation_any) ~
      "design_driven_rank_deficiency",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_on <- function(df_aggr,
                                       formula,
                                       exp_name = "encap_on",
                                       aggr_i,
                                       n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI)
  n_levels_var1 <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var1)
  n_levels_var2 <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var2)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  if (n_levels_var1 < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI = n_levels_aoi,
        n_distinct_var1 = n_levels_var1,
        n_distinct_var2 = n_levels_var2,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        design_missing_cells_any = NA,
        design_no_variation_any = NA,
        design_missing_var1_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_var2_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_var1_var2_cells = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_var1_variation = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_var2_variation = NA_character_,
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "var1 has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_var1"
      )
    )
  }

  if (n_levels_var2 < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI = n_levels_aoi,
        n_distinct_var1 = n_levels_var1,
        n_distinct_var2 = n_levels_var2,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        design_missing_cells_any = NA,
        design_no_variation_any = NA,
        design_missing_var1_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_var2_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_var1_var2_cells = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_var1_variation = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_var2_variation = NA_character_,
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "var2 has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_var2"
      )
    )
  }

  if (n_levels_aoi < 2 && n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI = n_levels_aoi,
        n_distinct_var1 = n_levels_var1,
        n_distinct_var2 = n_levels_var2,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        design_missing_cells_any = NA,
        design_no_variation_any = NA,
        design_missing_var1_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_var2_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_var1_var2_cells = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_var1_variation = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_var2_variation = NA_character_,
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI has fewer than 2 levels although cluster is expected to contain multiple AOIs",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI"
      )
    )
  }

  design_structure <- inspect_design_structure_encap_on(df_aggr)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  fit_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
      predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_aggr))
    )

    calc_fit_metrics(
      obs = df_aggr$TRT,
      pred = fitted_vals
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_structure) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        design_missing_cells_any = design_missing_cells_any,
        design_no_variation_any = design_no_variation_any
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_encap_on <- function(df,
                                  exp_name = "encap_on") {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_fullfit_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, as.character(cluster_sizes$aggr_level))
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on(
      response = "TRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    fit_one_full_case_encap_on(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_fullfit <- run_fullfits_encap_on(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit$fullfit_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation: Keine Probleme im Full Fit

*TRT: Topic LOO mit Fit Problemen*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_topicloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# - mehrere AOIs im Cluster:
#     TRT ~ var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + ...
# - genau eine AOI im Cluster:
#     TRT ~ var1 * var2 + nLetters + ...
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on <- function(response = "TRT",
                                          n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on <- function(df,
                                                           formula,
                                                           n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(AOI, var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  } else {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
    n_design_cells = nrow(cell_df),
    n_empty_design_cells = sum(cell_df$n_obs == 0),
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on <- function(df,
                                         formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                      fit_warning_text,
                                      fit_message_text,
                                      fit_error,
                                      fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                      fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                      prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on <- function(train_df,
                                           test_df,
                                           formula,
                                           n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                           exp_name = "encap_on",
                                           aggr_i,
                                           topic_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$TRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR encap_on
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_encap_on <- function(df,
                                  exp_name = "encap_on",
                                  verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_topicloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on(
      response = "TRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_topicloo <- run_topicloo_encap_on(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
Im TRT Topic LOO gibt es keine Fit Probleme
Die Holdout-Evaluation ergab für alle AOI-Cluster numerisch stabile Modellschätzungen ohne Konvergenzprobleme, Warnungen oder Hinweise auf mangelnde Identifizierbarkeit. Die prädiktive Güte unterschied sich jedoch deutlich zwischen den Clustern. Die beste Generalisierungsleistung zeigte das Modell für den Cluster 4, 5, 6, gefolgt von 7, 9. Deutlich höhere Vorhersagefehler ergaben sich für die Cluster 2, 3, 8 und insbesondere 1. Die Bias-Werte lagen insgesamt vergleichsweise nahe bei 0, sodass die Modelle meist keine starke systematische Über- oder Unterschätzung zeigten. Die Hauptschwäche in den schwächeren Clustern lag daher weniger in einer systematischen Verzerrung als in einer geringen Vorhersagepräzision.

*TRT: Participant LOO mit Fit Problemen*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_participantloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# - mehrere AOIs im Cluster:
#     TRT ~ var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + ...
# - genau eine AOI im Cluster:
#     TRT ~ var1 * var2 + nLetters + ...
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on <- function(response = "TRT",
                                          n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on <- function(df,
                                                           formula,
                                                           n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(AOI, var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  } else {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
    n_design_cells = nrow(cell_df),
    n_empty_design_cells = sum(cell_df$n_obs == 0),
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on <- function(df,
                                         formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                      fit_warning_text,
                                      fit_message_text,
                                      fit_error,
                                      fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                      fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                      prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on <- function(train_df,
                                                 test_df,
                                                 formula,
                                                 n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                 exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                 aggr_i,
                                                 participant_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$TRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR encap_on
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_encap_on <- function(df,
                                        exp_name = "encap_on",
                                        verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_participantloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on(
      response = "TRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_participantloo <- run_participantloo_encap_on(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
Im Output mit 78 Holdout-Fits pro AOI-Cluster sind die Modelle zunächst technisch unauffällig, da weder Fit-Fehler noch Hessian-, Konvergenz- oder Rank-Deficiency-Probleme auftraten. Die Unterschiede betreffen also allein die Vorhersagegüte. Am besten schneidet erneut der Cluster 4, 5, 6 ab, mit den kleinsten RMSE- und MAE-Werten und damit der besten Generalisierungsleistung auf neue Daten. Es folgen 7, 9 und danach 2, 3, während 8 und besonders 1 die höchsten Vorhersagefehler zeigen. Die mean bias-Werte sind in allen Clustern negativ, was im Mittel auf eine Tendenz zur Unterschätzung hindeutet. Gleichzeitig sind die median bias-Werte in allen Clustern positiv, was zeigt, dass in mehr als der Hälfte der Folds eher Überschätzung vorlag. Dass Mittelwert und Median hier unterschiedliche Vorzeichen haben, spricht dafür, dass einzelne stärkere negative Abweichungen den Mittelwert nach unten ziehen, obwohl die typische Fold-Tendenz eher leicht positiv ist. Insgesamt liegt die Hauptaussage aber weniger in einer starken systematischen Verzerrung als in der sehr unterschiedlichen Vorhersagepräzision zwischen den AOI-Clustern.


*FRT Full Data Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_fit_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_obs_metric = 0L,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_obs_metric = length(obs),
    rmse_in_sample = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae_in_sample = mean(abs(err)),
    bias_in_sample = mean(err),
    cor_obs_pred = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(obs, pred))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_fullfit_data_frt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# - mehrere AOIs im Cluster:
#     FRT ~ var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + ...
# - genau eine AOI im Cluster:
#     FRT ~ var1 * var2 + nLetters + ...
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt <- function(response = "FRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                                               formula,
                                                               n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(AOI, var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  } else {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
    n_design_cells = nrow(cell_df),
    n_empty_design_cells = sum(cell_df$n_obs == 0),
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# Achtung:
# glmmTMB hat kein direktes isSingular() wie lme4.
# Hier wird separat geprüft, ob Random-Intercept-Varianzen
# praktisch auf 0 liegen.
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                             formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_frt <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_on_frt <- function(df_aggr,
                                           formula,
                                           n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                           exp_name = "encap_on",
                                           aggr_i) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on_frt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_frt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  fit_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
      predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_aggr))
    )

    calc_fit_metrics(
      obs = df_aggr$FRT,
      pred = fitted_vals
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    n_aoi_observed = n_levels_aoi,
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_frt(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                      exp_name = "encap_on") {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_fullfit_data_frt(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt(
      response = "FRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    fit_one_full_case_encap_on_frt(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_fullfit_frt <- run_fullfits_encap_on_frt(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit_frt$fullfit_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit_frt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit_frt$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
Keine Probleme auf Full Data Fit


*FRT: Topic LOO + Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_topicloo_data_frt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# - mehrere AOIs im Cluster:
#     FRT ~ var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + ...
# - genau eine AOI im Cluster:
#     FRT ~ var1 * var2 + nLetters + ...
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt <- function(response = "FRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                                               formula,
                                                               n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(AOI, var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  } else {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
    n_design_cells = nrow(cell_df),
    n_empty_design_cells = sum(cell_df$n_obs == 0),
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                             formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_frt <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re,
                                          prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
```
