```{r}
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on_frt <- function(train_df,
                                               test_df,
                                               formula,
                                               n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                               exp_name = "encap_on",
                                               aggr_i,
                                               topic_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on_frt(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_frt(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$FRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_frt(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR encap_on, FRT
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                      exp_name = "encap_on",
                                      verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_topicloo_data_frt(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt(
      response = "FRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on_frt(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_topicloo_frt <- run_topicloo_encap_on_frt(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_frt$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_frt$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_frt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_frt$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
Im FRT-Output mit Topic-LOO sind die Modelle insgesamt methodisch weitgehend unauffällig: Es gibt keine Fit-, Hessian-, Konvergenz- oder Rank-Deficiency-Probleme, nur vereinzelt singuläre Random Effects, was auf eine teilweise sehr geringe Random-Effects-Varianz in einzelnen Folds hindeutet, aber keinen gravierenden Modellfehler darstellt. Inhaltlich zeigt sich wieder ein klarer Trend in der Vorhersagegüte: Einige AOI-Cluster generalisieren deutlich besser als andere, wobei vor allem der mittlere Clusterbereich am besten abschneidet, während die Randcluster höhere Fehler aufweisen. Beim Bias ergibt sich kein völlig einheitliches Bild, da je nach Cluster sowohl leichte Über- als auch Unterschätzung vorkommt und sich Mittelwert und Median teils unterscheiden. Insgesamt spricht der Output damit weniger für systematische Verzerrung als für unterschiedlich präzise Vorhersagen zwischen den AOI-Clustern.


*FRT: Participant LOO + Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_participantloo_data_frt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# - mehrere AOIs im Cluster:
#     FRT ~ var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + ...
# - genau eine AOI im Cluster:
#     FRT ~ var1 * var2 + nLetters + ...
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt <- function(response = "FRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                                               formula,
                                                               n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(AOI, var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  } else {
    cell_df <- df %>%
      group_by(var1, var2, .drop = FALSE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_obs = dplyr::n(),
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(nLetters),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
    n_design_cells = nrow(cell_df),
    n_empty_design_cells = sum(cell_df$n_obs == 0),
    n_cells_nLetters_constant = sum(cell_df$n_distinct_nLetters <= 1)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                             formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_frt <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re,
                                          prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on_frt <- function(train_df,
                                                     test_df,
                                                     formula,
                                                     n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                     exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                     aggr_i,
                                                     participant_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_on_frt(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_frt(
    df = train_df,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$FRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_frt(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR encap_on, FRT
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_encap_on_frt <- function(df,
                                            exp_name = "encap_on",
                                            verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_participantloo_data_frt(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt(
      response = "FRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on_frt(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula = formula_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rank_deficient = sum(fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_participantloo_frt <- run_participantloo_encap_on_frt(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_frt$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_frt$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_frt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_frt$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
Im FRT-Output mit Participant-LOO sind die Modelle methodisch komplett unauffällig, da über alle Cluster hinweg weder Fit- noch Hessian-, Singularitäts-, Konvergenz- oder Rank-Deficiency-Probleme auftreten. Die Unterschiede liegen also wieder allein in der Vorhersagegüte. Dabei reicht der mean RMSE grob von etwa 376 bis 1330, der mean MAE von etwa 269 bis 1192, was zeigt, dass sich die Generalisierungsleistung zwischen den AOI-Clustern deutlich unterscheidet. Einige Cluster zeigen also klar kleinere, andere deutlich größere Vorhersagefehler. Die mean bias-Werte sind durchweg negativ, also im Mittel eher eine Tendenz zur Unterschätzung, liegen aber meist in einem moderaten Bereich. Gleichzeitig sind mehrere median bias-Werte positiv, was darauf hindeutet, dass einzelne stärkere negative Abweichungen den Mittelwert nach unten ziehen, obwohl die typische Fold-Tendenz eher leicht positiv sein kann. Insgesamt spricht der Output damit für stabile Modelle, aber für eine je nach AOI-Cluster klar unterschiedliche Vorhersagepräzision.

*RRT: Full Data Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_fit_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_obs_metric = 0L,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_obs_metric = length(obs),
    rmse_in_sample = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae_in_sample = mean(abs(err)),
    bias_in_sample = mean(err),
    cor_obs_pred = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(obs, pred))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# RRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# RRT darf 0 sein
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_fullfit_data_rrt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      is_zero = RRT == 0
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# - mehrere AOIs im Cluster:
#     cond/ziformula: var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters
# - genau eine AOI im Cluster:
#     cond/ziformula: var1 * var2 + nLetters
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(response = "RRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters"
  }

  as.formula(paste("~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# getrennt für cond und zi
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                                 formula_cond,
                                                 formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
      prop_zero = mean(df$RRT == 0),
      n_zero = sum(df$RRT == 0),
      n_positive = sum(df$RRT > 0)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                             formula_cond,
                                             formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                          zi_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_on_rrt <- function(df_aggr,
                                           formula_cond,
                                           formula_zi,
                                           n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                           exp_name = "encap_on",
                                           aggr_i) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  fit_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
      predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_aggr))
    )

    calc_fit_metrics(
      obs = df_aggr$RRT,
      pred = fitted_vals
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    n_aoi_observed = n_levels_aoi,
    formula_cond = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    formula_zi = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                      exp_name = "encap_on") {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_fullfit_data_rrt(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_cond <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      response = "RRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    formula_zi <- make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    fit_one_full_case_encap_on_rrt(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula_cond = formula_cond,
      formula_zi = formula_zi,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_fullfit_rrt <- run_fullfits_encap_on_rrt(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit_rrt$fullfit_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit_rrt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_fullfit_rrt$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
singular_random_effects bei aggr_level 1

*RRT: Topic LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Fit und Fehlermetriken auf allen Werten
# Erwartet:
# RRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_topicloo_data_rrt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(response = "RRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters"
  }

  as.formula(paste("~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# getrennt für cond und zi
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                                 formula_cond,
                                                 formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
      prop_zero = mean(df$RRT == 0),
      n_zero = sum(df$RRT == 0),
      n_positive = sum(df$RRT > 0)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                             formula_cond,
                                             formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                          zi_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re,
                                          prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# Vorhersage und Fehlermetriken auf allen Testwerten
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on_rrt <- function(train_df,
                                               test_df,
                                               formula_cond,
                                               formula_zi,
                                               n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                               exp_name = "encap_on",
                                               aggr_i,
                                               topic_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$RRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$RRT == 0),
    n_test_positive = sum(test_df$RRT > 0),
    formula_cond = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    formula_zi = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR encap_on, RRT
# Gesamtbereich inklusive 0ern
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                      exp_name = "encap_on",
                                      verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_topicloo_data_rrt(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_cond <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      response = "RRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    formula_zi <- make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on_rrt(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_zero = sum(n_test_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_positive = sum(n_test_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_topicloo_rrt <- run_topicloo_encap_on_rrt(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_rrt$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_rrt$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_rrt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_topicloo_rrt$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
1	singular_random_effects	4		
7, 9	singular_random_effects	3		
2, 3	singular_random_effects	1		
4, 5, 6	singular_random_effects	1		
8	nonposdef_hessian	1		
8	nonzero_convergence	1		
Im Topic-LOO des encap_on-Experiments wirkt die RRT-Evaluation erneut deutlich schwieriger als bei TRT und FRT. Zwar gibt es keine fehlgeschlagenen Fits und keine Rank-Deficiency, aber in mehreren Clustern treten singuläre Random Effects auf, und in einem Cluster zusätzlich ein non-positive-definite Hessian, ein Konvergenzproblem und Warnungen. Das spricht dafür, dass die Modelle formal meist noch schätzbar sind, in einzelnen Teilmodellen aber an Stabilitätsgrenzen kommen. Auch die Vorhersagegüte schwankt merklich, mit mean RMSE-Werten grob zwischen 606 und 999 und mean MAE-Werten zwischen 384 und 707. Besonders wichtig sind hier die Bias-Werte: Die mean bias-Werte sind in allen Clustern negativ, ungefähr im Bereich von -86 bis -6, und deuten damit durchgängig auf eine Tendenz zur Unterschätzung hin. Auch die median bias-Werte sind überall negativ, etwa zwischen -96 und -19, sodass diese Unterschätzung nicht nur auf einzelne Ausreißer zurückgeht, sondern insgesamt recht konsistent erscheint. Insgesamt zeigt der Output also ein eher heterogenes und teilweise instabiles Bild, bei dem neben den teils hohen Fehlerwerten vor allem die systematische Unterschätzung auffällt.


*RRT: Participant LOO  +  Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_test = 0L,
      rmse   = NA_real_,
      mae    = NA_real_,
      bias   = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_test = length(obs),
    rmse   = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae    = mean(abs(err)),
    bias   = mean(err)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Fit und Fehlermetriken auf allen Werten
# Erwartet:
# RRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_participantloo_data_rrt <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(response = "RRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters"
  }

  as.formula(paste("~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# getrennt für cond und zi
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                                 formula_cond,
                                                 formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters),
      prop_zero = mean(df$RRT == 0),
      n_zero = sum(df$RRT == 0),
      n_positive = sum(df$RRT > 0)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                             formula_cond,
                                             formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# Hessian und Singularität getrennt
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                          zi_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re,
                                          prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# Vorhersage und Fehlermetriken auf allen Testwerten
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on_rrt <- function(train_df,
                                                     test_df,
                                                     formula_cond,
                                                     formula_zi,
                                                     n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                     exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                     aggr_i,
                                                     participant_i) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_
  pred <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))

  if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred <- tryCatch(
      predict(
        fit_obj,
        newdata = test_df,
        type = "response",
        re.form = NULL,
        allow.new.levels = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )
  }

  metric_info <- calc_metrics(
    obs = test_df$RRT,
    pred = pred
  )

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$RRT == 0),
    n_test_positive = sum(test_df$RRT > 0),
    formula_cond = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    formula_zi = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(metric_info) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR encap_on, RRT
# Gesamtbereich inklusive 0ern
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_encap_on_rrt <- function(df,
                                            exp_name = "encap_on",
                                            verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_participantloo_data_rrt(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_cond <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      response = "RRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    formula_zi <- make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on_rrt(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_zero = sum(n_test_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_test_positive = sum(n_test_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mae = mean(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rmse = median(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_mae = median(mae, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_bias = median(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_participantloo_rrt <- run_participantloo_encap_on_rrt(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_rrt$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_rrt$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_rrt$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_participantloo_rrt$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
Im Participant-LOO des encap_on-Experiments bleibt die RRT-Evaluation methodisch insgesamt unauffällig, da es keine fehlgeschlagenen Fits, keine Hessian-, Konvergenz- oder Rank-Deficiency-Probleme und auch keine Warnungen gibt. Auffällig ist aber, dass in einigen Clustern weiterhin häufig singuläre Random Effects auftreten, teils sehr oft, was darauf hindeutet, dass die Random-Effects-Struktur nicht überall gleichermaßen stabil getragen wird. Die Vorhersagegüte variiert erneut sichtbar, mit mean RMSE-Werten ungefähr zwischen 499 und 862 und mean MAE-Werten zwischen 361 und 697. Für die inhaltliche Einordnung sind hier vor allem die Bias-Werte wichtig: Die mean bias-Werte sind in allen Clustern negativ, etwa zwischen -142 und -26, was im Mittel auf eine systematische Unterschätzung hindeutet. Gleichzeitig sind die median bias-Werte in allen Clustern positiv, ungefähr zwischen 27 und 97. Das zeigt, dass die typische Fold-Tendenz eher leicht positiv ist, der Mittelwert aber durch stärkere negative Abweichungen nach unten gezogen wird. Insgesamt spricht der Output also für formal stabile, aber in der Vorhersage recht heterogene Modelle, bei denen vor allem die auseinanderlaufenden Bias-Maße auffallen.

*0er: Participant LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_div <- function(num, den) {
  ifelse(is.na(den) | den == 0, NA_real_, num / den)
}

calc_zero_metrics <- function(obs_zero, pred_prob_zero, threshold = 0.5) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs_zero) & is.finite(pred_prob_zero)
  obs_zero <- obs_zero[keep]
  pred_prob_zero <- pred_prob_zero[keep]

  if (length(obs_zero) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_eval = 0L,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  pred_zero_class <- pred_prob_zero >= threshold

  TP <- sum(pred_zero_class & obs_zero)
  TN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FP <- sum(pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & obs_zero)

  recall_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FN)
  recall_positive <- safe_div(TN, TN + FP)
  precision_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FP)
  accuracy <- safe_div(TP + TN, length(obs_zero))

  balanced_accuracy <- if (all(is.na(c(recall_zero, recall_positive)))) {
    NA_real_
  } else {
    mean(c(recall_zero, recall_positive), na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  observed_zero_rate <- mean(obs_zero)
  mean_pred_zero_prob <- mean(pred_prob_zero)

  tibble(
    n_eval = length(obs_zero),
    threshold = threshold,
    observed_zero_rate = observed_zero_rate,
```
