```{r}
    mean_pred_zero_prob = mean_pred_zero_prob,
    calibration_gap = mean_pred_zero_prob - observed_zero_rate,
    brier_zero = mean((pred_prob_zero - as.numeric(obs_zero))^2),
    accuracy = accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy = balanced_accuracy,
    recall_zero = recall_zero,
    recall_positive = recall_positive,
    precision_zero = precision_zero,
    n_pred_zero = sum(pred_zero_class),
    n_pred_positive = sum(!pred_zero_class),
    TP_zero = TP,
    TN_positive = TN,
    FP_zero = FP,
    FN_zero = FN
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# RRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      is_zero = RRT == 0
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(response = "RRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters"
  }

  as.formula(paste("~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# NULLWAHRSCHEINLICHKEIT
# =========================================================

predict_prob_zero <- function(fit_obj, newdata) {
  predict(
    fit_obj,
    newdata = newdata,
    type = "zprob",
    re.form = NULL,
    allow.new.levels = TRUE
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                          zi_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re,
                                          prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PARTICIPANT-LOO-FIT
# 0-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on_rrt_zero <- function(train_df,
                                                          test_df,
                                                          formula_cond,
                                                          formula_zi,
                                                          n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                          exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                          aggr_i,
                                                          participant_i,
                                                          threshold = 0.5) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_

  zero_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred_prob_zero <- tryCatch(
      predict_prob_zero(fit_obj, test_df),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )

    calc_zero_metrics(
      obs_zero = test_df$is_zero,
      pred_prob_zero = pred_prob_zero,
      threshold = threshold
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_eval = NA_real_,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_participant = participant_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$is_zero),
    n_test_positive = sum(!test_df$is_zero),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(zero_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# PARTICIPANT-LOO FÜR 0-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

run_participantloo_encap_on_rrt_zero <- function(df,
                                                 exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                 threshold = 0.5,
                                                 verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_cond <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      response = "RRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    formula_zi <- make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    participants_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Participant))

    purrr::map_dfr(participants_cluster, function(participant_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) != participant_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Participant) == participant_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT zero Participant-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_participant=", participant_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_participantloo_case_encap_on_rrt_zero(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        participant_i = participant_i,
        threshold = threshold
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_n_eval = sum(n_eval, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_observed_zero_rate = mean(observed_zero_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_pred_zero_prob = mean(mean_pred_zero_prob, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_calibration_gap = mean(calibration_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_brier_zero = mean(brier_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_balanced_accuracy = mean(balanced_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_zero = mean(recall_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_positive = mean(recall_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_precision_zero = mean(precision_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_participant)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo <- run_participantloo_encap_on_rrt_zero(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  threshold = 0.5,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_participantloo$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
In der 0er-Analyse der RRT zeigt sich zunächst, dass die Zero-Inflation-Komponente methodisch stabil läuft: Es gibt keine Fit-Fehler, keine Konvergenzprobleme, keine Rank-Deficiency und keine Warnungen, nur in manchen Clustern wieder singuläre Random Effects. 
Die mittlere Kalibrierung der Nullwahrscheinlichkeiten ist insgesamt sehr gut. Die vorhergesagte Nullwahrscheinlichkeit stimmt in allen Clustern praktisch exakt mit dem beobachteten Nullanteil überein, und auch der calibration gap liegt durchgehend bei 0 oder nahezu 0. Die Modelle erfassen damit die durchschnittliche 0er-Rate der jeweiligen Cluster sehr präzise. Unterschiede zeigen sich jedoch in der Fähigkeit, einzelne Null- und Positivfälle voneinander zu trennen. Diese Trennleistung variiert deutlich zwischen den Clustern, was sich an accuracy, balanced accuracy sowie an recall_zero und recall_positive zeigt. In einigen Clustern ist die Klassifikation vergleichsweise ausgewogen, in anderen deutlich einseitiger. Besonders auffällig ist der Cluster mit nahezu keinem Nullanteil: Dort sind accuracy und Brier-Wert zwar nahezu perfekt, diese Werte sind inhaltlich aber nur eingeschränkt aussagekräftig, da es faktisch kaum Nullfälle zu identifizieren gibt. Insgesamt deutet Output 1 somit auf eine sehr gute mittlere Kalibrierung der Zero-Inflation-Komponente hin, bei zugleich clusterabhängig unterschiedlicher Trennschärfe zwischen Null- und Positivfällen.

*0er Topic LOO*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_div <- function(num, den) {
  ifelse(is.na(den) | den == 0, NA_real_, num / den)
}

calc_zero_metrics <- function(obs_zero, pred_prob_zero, threshold = 0.5) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs_zero) & is.finite(pred_prob_zero)
  obs_zero <- obs_zero[keep]
  pred_prob_zero <- pred_prob_zero[keep]

  if (length(obs_zero) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_eval = 0L,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  pred_zero_class <- pred_prob_zero >= threshold

  TP <- sum(pred_zero_class & obs_zero)
  TN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FP <- sum(pred_zero_class & !obs_zero)
  FN <- sum(!pred_zero_class & obs_zero)

  recall_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FN)
  recall_positive <- safe_div(TN, TN + FP)
  precision_zero <- safe_div(TP, TP + FP)
  accuracy <- safe_div(TP + TN, length(obs_zero))

  balanced_accuracy <- if (all(is.na(c(recall_zero, recall_positive)))) {
    NA_real_
  } else {
    mean(c(recall_zero, recall_positive), na.rm = TRUE)
  }

  observed_zero_rate <- mean(obs_zero)
  mean_pred_zero_prob <- mean(pred_prob_zero)

  tibble(
    n_eval = length(obs_zero),
    threshold = threshold,
    observed_zero_rate = observed_zero_rate,
    mean_pred_zero_prob = mean_pred_zero_prob,
    calibration_gap = mean_pred_zero_prob - observed_zero_rate,
    brier_zero = mean((pred_prob_zero - as.numeric(obs_zero))^2),
    accuracy = accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy = balanced_accuracy,
    recall_zero = recall_zero,
    recall_positive = recall_positive,
    precision_zero = precision_zero,
    n_pred_zero = sum(pred_zero_class),
    n_pred_positive = sum(!pred_zero_class),
    TP_zero = TP,
    TN_positive = TN,
    FP_zero = FP,
    FN_zero = FN
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# RRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "RRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(RRT), RRT >= 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      is_zero = RRT == 0
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(response = "RRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt <- function(n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters"
  }

  as.formula(paste("~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECKS
# =========================================================

inspect_one_matrix <- function(formula, data) {
  mf <- model.frame(formula, data = droplevels(data), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(formula, data = mf)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols)
  )
}

inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  fixed_cond <- lme4::nobars(formula_cond)

  cond_info <- inspect_one_matrix(fixed_cond, df) %>%
    rename(
      cond_X_rank = X_rank,
      cond_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      cond_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      cond_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  zi_info <- inspect_one_matrix(formula_zi, df) %>%
    rename(
      zi_X_rank = X_rank,
      zi_X_ncol = X_ncol,
      zi_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
      zi_redundant_cols = redundant_cols
    )

  bind_cols(cond_info, zi_info) %>%
    mutate(
      n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
      min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
      max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
    )
}

# =========================================================
# HEURISTIK FÜR SINGULAR RANDOM EFFECTS IN glmmTMB
# =========================================================

extract_re_variances_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj) {
  vc <- tryCatch(VarCorr(fit_obj), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(vc) || is.null(vc$cond)) return(numeric(0))

  vars <- c()

  for (grp in names(vc$cond)) {
    mat <- vc$cond[[grp]]
    sd_attr <- attr(mat, "stddev")

    if (!is.null(sd_attr) && length(sd_attr) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, as.numeric(sd_attr)^2)
    } else if (is.matrix(mat) && nrow(mat) > 0) {
      vars <- c(vars, diag(as.matrix(mat)))
    }
  }

  vars
}

check_singular_re_glmmtmb <- function(fit_obj, tol = 1e-8) {
  re_vars <- extract_re_variances_glmmtmb(fit_obj)

  if (length(re_vars) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      fit_singular_re = NA,
      n_random_effect_vars = 0L,
      n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
      min_random_effect_var = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    fit_singular_re = any(re_vars < tol),
    n_random_effect_vars = length(re_vars),
    n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = sum(re_vars < tol),
    min_random_effect_var = min(re_vars)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FIT
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt <- function(df, formula_cond, formula_zi) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula_cond,
        ziformula = formula_zi,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = ziGamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        fit_singular_re = NA,
        n_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        n_near_zero_random_effect_vars = NA_integer_,
        min_random_effect_var = NA_real_,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  singular_info <- check_singular_re_glmmtmb(fit)

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(singular_info) %>%
      mutate(
        aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# NULLWAHRSCHEINLICHKEIT
# =========================================================

predict_prob_zero <- function(fit_obj, newdata) {
  predict(
    fit_obj,
    newdata = newdata,
    type = "zprob",
    re.form = NULL,
    allow.new.levels = TRUE
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_on_rrt <- function(cond_rank_deficient,
                                          zi_rank_deficient,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          fit_message_text,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_singular_re,
                                          prediction_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error, prediction_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  any_rankdef <- isTRUE(cond_rank_deficient) || isTRUE(zi_rank_deficient)

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    !is.na(prediction_error) ~ "prediction_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_singular_re) ~ "singular_random_effects",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    any_rankdef &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    any_rankdef ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_signal_only",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN TOPIC-LOO-FIT
# 0-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on_rrt_zero <- function(train_df,
                                                    test_df,
                                                    formula_cond,
                                                    formula_zi,
                                                    n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                    exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                    aggr_i,
                                                    topic_i,
                                                    threshold = 0.5) {
  train_df <- droplevels(train_df)
  test_df  <- droplevels(test_df)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrices_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_on_rrt(
    df = train_df,
    formula_cond = formula_cond,
    formula_zi = formula_zi
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  pred_error <- NA_character_

  zero_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    pred_prob_zero <- tryCatch(
      predict_prob_zero(fit_obj, test_df),
      error = function(e) {
        pred_error <<- conditionMessage(e)
        rep(NA_real_, nrow(test_df))
      }
    )

    calc_zero_metrics(
      obs_zero = test_df$is_zero,
      pred_prob_zero = pred_prob_zero,
      threshold = threshold
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_eval = NA_real_,
      threshold = threshold,
      observed_zero_rate = NA_real_,
      mean_pred_zero_prob = NA_real_,
      calibration_gap = NA_real_,
      brier_zero = NA_real_,
      accuracy = NA_real_,
      balanced_accuracy = NA_real_,
      recall_zero = NA_real_,
      recall_positive = NA_real_,
      precision_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_zero = NA_real_,
      n_pred_positive = NA_real_,
      TP_zero = NA_real_,
      TN_positive = NA_real_,
      FP_zero = NA_real_,
      FN_zero = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    heldout_topic = topic_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_train = nrow(train_df),
    n_test_rows = nrow(test_df),
    n_test_zero = sum(test_df$is_zero),
    n_test_positive = sum(!test_df$is_zero),
    cond_formula = paste(deparse(formula_cond), collapse = " "),
    zi_formula = paste(deparse(formula_zi), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(zero_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      prediction_error = pred_error,
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_on_rrt(
        cond_rank_deficient = cond_rank_deficient,
        zi_rank_deficient = zi_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_singular_re = fit_singular_re,
        prediction_error = prediction_error
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# TOPIC-LOO FÜR 0-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

run_topicloo_encap_on_rrt_zero <- function(df,
                                           exp_name = "encap_on",
                                           threshold = 0.5,
                                           verbose = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  loo_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    dat_cluster <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_cond <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      response = "RRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    formula_zi <- make_ziformula_cluster_encap_on_rrt(
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    topics_cluster <- unique(as.character(dat_cluster$Topic))

    purrr::map_dfr(topics_cluster, function(topic_i) {
      train_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) != topic_i)

      test_df <- dat_cluster %>%
        filter(as.character(Topic) == topic_i)

      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message(
          "[RRT zero Topic-LOO] exp=", exp_name,
          " aggr_level=", aggr_i,
          " holdout_topic=", topic_i,
          " n_train=", nrow(train_df)
        )
      }

      fit_one_topicloo_case_encap_on_rrt_zero(
        train_df = train_df,
        test_df = test_df,
        formula_cond = formula_cond,
        formula_zi = formula_zi,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
        exp_name = exp_name,
        aggr_i = aggr_i,
        topic_i = topic_i,
        threshold = threshold
      )
    })
  })

  loo_summary <- loo_all %>%
    mutate(has_warning = n_warning_messages > 0) %>%
    group_by(experiment, aggr_level) %>%
    summarise(
      n_holdout_fits = dplyr::n(),
      n_fit_failed = sum(fit_ok %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonposdef_hessian = sum(fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_singular_re = sum(fit_singular_re %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_convergence = sum(fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cond_rank_deficient = sum(cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_zi_rank_deficient = sum(zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_fits_with_warning = sum(has_warning, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_warning_messages = sum(n_warning_messages, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_n_eval = sum(n_eval, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_observed_zero_rate = mean(observed_zero_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_pred_zero_prob = mean(mean_pred_zero_prob, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_calibration_gap = mean(calibration_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_brier_zero = mean(brier_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_balanced_accuracy = mean(balanced_accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_zero = mean(recall_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_recall_positive = mean(recall_positive, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_precision_zero = mean(precision_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  problem_counts <- loo_all %>%
    count(aggr_level, problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- loo_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_singular_re %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        cond_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        zi_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0 |
        !is.na(prediction_error)
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level, heldout_topic)

  list(
    loo_all = loo_all,
    loo_summary = loo_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo <- run_topicloo_encap_on_rrt_zero(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  threshold = 0.5,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo$loo_all)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo$loo_summary)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_encap_on_rrt_zero_topicloo$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
0er Topic LOO analyse: 
Die mittlere Kalibrierung der Nullwahrscheinlichkeiten ist weiterhin gut, da die vorhergesagte Nullwahrscheinlichkeit in allen Clustern nah am beobachteten Nullanteil liegt und der calibration gap mit etwa -0.014 bis 0.021 klein bleibt. Die durchschnittliche 0er-Rate wird also auch hier insgesamt angemessen getroffen. Gleichzeitig treten in einzelnen Clustern zusätzliche Auffälligkeiten in der Modellschätzung auf, insbesondere singuläre Random Effects und in einem Cluster außerdem ein Hessian-Problem, ein Konvergenzproblem sowie Warnungen. Diese Befunde sprechen dafür, dass die Zero-Inflation-Komponente inhaltlich zwar brauchbar kalibriert ist, einzelne Teilmodelle aber numerisch weniger stabil sind als im ersten Output. Die eigentliche Trennleistung zwischen Null- und Positivfällen ist auch hier clusterabhängig und sollte nicht allein aus accuracy-Werten abgeleitet werden, sondern aus dem Zusammenspiel von balanced accuracy, recall_zero und recall_positive. Insgesamt spricht Output 2 daher ebenfalls für eine gute mittlere Kalibrierung der Nullwahrscheinlichkeiten, aber für eine je nach Cluster unterschiedlich starke und teils diagnostisch eingeschränkte Trennung zwischen Null- und Positivfällen.


**Residualanalyse**


*TRT DHARMa*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(DHARMa)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================================================
# SETTINGS
# =========================================================

set.seed(123)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  x <- x[keep]
  y <- y[keep]

  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x, y))
}

safe_test_p <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("p.value" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  p <- test_obj$p.value
  if (is.null(p) || length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(p[1])
}

safe_test_stat <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("statistic" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  s <- test_obj$statistic
  if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(s[1])
}

safe_kruskal_test <- function(residual, group) {
  keep <- is.finite(residual) & !is.na(group)
  residual <- residual[keep]
  group <- group[keep]

  if (length(residual) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(unique(group)) < 2) return(NULL)

  tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(residual ~ group),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# TRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_trt_residual_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_trt <- function(response = "TRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FIT MIT FEHLER- UND WARNING-CATCHING
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_trt_encap_on <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DHARMa-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

analyse_dharma_trt_encap_on <- function(fit_obj, df, group_var, nsim = 2000) {
  simres <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = fit_obj,
    n = nsim,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  dharma_res <- simres$scaledResiduals
  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  )

  uniform_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testUniformity(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dispersion_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testDispersion(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  outlier_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testOutliers(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_dharma <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_kruskal <- safe_kruskal_test(
    residual = dharma_res,
    group = group_var
  )

  quantiles_warn <- character()
  quantiles_test <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testQuantiles(simres, predictor = df$nLetters),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      quantiles_warn <<- c(quantiles_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  quantiles_error <- if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(quantiles_test)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    quantiles_test <- NULL
  }

  categorical_warn <- character()
  categorical_test_dharma2 <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      categorical_warn <<- c(categorical_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  categorical_error <- if (inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(categorical_test_dharma2)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    categorical_test_dharma <- categorical_test_dharma2
  }

  dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_dharma)
  dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_dharma)

  if (is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && !is.null(categorical_test_kruskal)) {
    dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_kruskal)
    dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_kruskal)
  }

  residual_summary <- tibble(
    n_obs_residuals = nrow(df),
    residual_mean = mean(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_median = median(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_sd = stats::sd(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_min = min(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_max = max(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_lt_0_05 = mean(dharma_res < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_gt_0_95 = mean(dharma_res > 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    cor_resid_fitted = safe_cor(dharma_res, fitted_vals),
    cor_resid_nLetters = safe_cor(dharma_res, df$nLetters),
    dharma_uniformity_stat = safe_test_stat(uniform_test),
    dharma_uniformity_p = safe_test_p(uniform_test),
    dharma_dispersion_stat = safe_test_stat(dispersion_test),
    dharma_dispersion_p = safe_test_p(dispersion_test),
    dharma_outlier_stat = safe_test_stat(outlier_test),
    dharma_outlier_p = safe_test_p(outlier_test),
    dharma_categorical_stat = dharma_categorical_stat,
    dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
    dharma_quantiles_stat = safe_test_stat(quantiles_test),
    dharma_quantiles_p = safe_test_p(quantiles_test),
    dharma_categorical_warning = collapse_unique(categorical_warn),
    dharma_categorical_error = categorical_error,
    dharma_quantiles_warning = collapse_unique(quantiles_warn),
    dharma_quantiles_error = quantiles_error
  )

  plot_data <- tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = dharma_res,
    nLetters = df$nLetters,
    observed = df$TRT
  )

  list(
    simres = simres,
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    tests = list(
      uniform_test = uniform_test,
      dispersion_test = dispersion_test,
      outlier_test = outlier_test,
      categorical_test_dharma = categorical_test_dharma,
      categorical_test_kruskal = categorical_test_kruskal,
      quantiles_test = quantiles_test
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_trt_residual <- function(fit_ok,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          dharma_uniformity_p,
                                          dharma_dispersion_p,
                                          dharma_outlier_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_p,
                                          dharma_quantiles_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_warning,
                                          dharma_quantiles_warning,
                                          dharma_categorical_error,
                                          dharma_quantiles_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(
      fit_error,
      fit_warning_text,
      dharma_categorical_warning,
      dharma_quantiles_warning,
      dharma_categorical_error,
      dharma_quantiles_error
    ),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !isTRUE(fit_ok) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_outlier_p) && dharma_outlier_p < 0.05 ~
      "outlier_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_quantiles_p) && dharma_quantiles_p < 0.05 ~
      "quantiles_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("outer Newton did not converge fully|step failure", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "diagnostic_test_warning",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficiency_signal",
    !is.na(fit_warning_text) ~ "warning_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PLOTFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Residuals vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_trt_residuals_vs_nLetters <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nLetters, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Residuals vs nLetters | ", aggr_label),
      x = "nLetters",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_trt_observed_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = observed)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] TRT Observed vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Observed TRT"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_on_trt_residual <- function(df_aggr,
                                                    formula,
                                                    group_var,
                                                    exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                    aggr_i,
                                                    n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                    nsim = 2000) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_trt_encap_on(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  if (is.null(fit_obj)) {
    summary_tbl <- tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
      cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
      n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
      n_var1 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var1),
      n_var2 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var2),
      n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
      formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        n_obs_residuals = NA_real_,
        residual_mean = NA_real_,
        residual_median = NA_real_,
        residual_sd = NA_real_,
        residual_min = NA_real_,
        residual_max = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_lt_0_05 = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_gt_0_95 = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_fitted = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_nLetters = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_categorical_error = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "fit_error"
      )

    return(list(
      summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
      simres = NULL,
      plot_data = NULL,
      tests = NULL
    ))
  }

  dharma_res <- analyse_dharma_trt_encap_on(
    fit_obj = fit_obj,
    df = df_aggr,
    group_var = group_var,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  summary_tbl <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
    n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
    n_var1 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var1),
    n_var2 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var2),
    n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(dharma_res$residual_summary) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_trt_residual(
        fit_ok = fit_ok,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        dharma_uniformity_p = dharma_uniformity_p,
        dharma_dispersion_p = dharma_dispersion_p,
        dharma_outlier_p = dharma_outlier_p,
        dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
        dharma_quantiles_p = dharma_quantiles_p,
        dharma_categorical_warning = dharma_categorical_warning,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = dharma_quantiles_warning,
        dharma_categorical_error = dharma_categorical_error,
        dharma_quantiles_error = dharma_quantiles_error
      )
    )

  list(
    summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
    simres = dharma_res$simres,
    plot_data = dharma_res$plot_data,
    tests = dharma_res$tests
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUTOMATISCHE PLOTAUSGABE
# =========================================================

print_all_trt_residual_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  aggr_levels <- names(res_obj$plot_data_list)

  for (i in seq_along(aggr_levels)) {
    aggr_i <- aggr_levels[i]
    plot_data <- res_obj$plot_data_list[[aggr_i]]
    simres <- res_obj$simres_list[[aggr_i]]

    if (is.null(plot_data) || is.null(simres)) next

    print(plot_trt_residuals_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 1))
    print(plot_trt_residuals_vs_nLetters(plot_data, aggr_i, 2))
    print(plot_trt_observed_vs_fitted(plot_data, aggr_i, 3))

    graphics::plot(simres)
    graphics::mtext(
      text = paste0("[4/4] Standard DHARMa Plot | ", aggr_i),
      side = 3,
      line = 1,
      cex = 1.1,
      font = 2
    )
  }
}

# =========================================================
# HAUPTFUNKTION
# =========================================================

run_trt_residual_analysis_encap_on <- function(df,
                                               exp_name = "encap_on",
                                               nsim = 2000,
                                               print_plots = TRUE) {
  prep <- prep_encap_on_trt_residual_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  res_list <- purrr::map(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, cluster_sizes$aggr_level)
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_on_trt(
      response = "TRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    group_var <- if (n_aoi_cluster > 1) {
      interaction(df_aggr$var1, df_aggr$var2, df_aggr$AOI, drop = TRUE)
    } else {
      interaction(df_aggr$var1, df_aggr$var2, drop = TRUE)
    }

    fit_one_full_case_encap_on_trt_residual(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      group_var = group_var,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster,
      nsim = nsim
    )
  })

  names(res_list) <- aggr_levels

  residual_summary <- purrr::map_dfr(res_list, "summary_tbl")

  problem_counts <- residual_summary %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- residual_summary %>%
    filter(problem_type != "none") %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  plot_data_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "plot_data")
  simres_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "simres")
  tests_list <- purrr::map(res_list, "tests")

  out <- list(
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only,
    plot_data_list = plot_data_list,
    simres_list = simres_list,
    tests_list = tests_list,
    raw_results = res_list
  )

  if (isTRUE(print_plots)) {
    print_all_trt_residual_plots(out)
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_trt_residuals_encap_on <- run_trt_residual_analysis_encap_on(
  df = encap_on,
  exp_name = "encap_on",
  nsim = 2000,
  print_plots = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# TABELLEN
# =========================================================

round_df_4(res_trt_residuals_encap_on$residual_summary)
round_df_4(res_trt_residuals_encap_on$problem_counts)
round_df_4(res_trt_residuals_encap_on$problem_fits_only)
```
Experiment Anaphoric Encapsulation:
In der DHARMa-Analyse ergibt sich insgesamt kein Bild eines generellen Modellzusammenbruchs, aber auch keine vollständig unauffällige Residualdiagnostik. Die Modelle wurden zunächst technisch stabil geschätzt, ohne Fit-Fehler, Hessian- oder Konvergenzprobleme. Auch die globaleren DHARMa-Tests auf Uniformität und Dispersion fallen überwiegend unauffällig aus, was gegen eine grobe Verteilungsfehlanpassung spricht. Gleichzeitig zeigen einzelne Teilmodelle signifikante Ausreißer- oder Quantilsignale. Solche Befunde deuten eher auf lokale Missanpassungen hin, also darauf, dass bestimmte Bereiche der Verteilung oder einzelne Beobachtungen nicht vollständig adäquat erfasst werden, ohne dass deshalb automatisch das gesamte Modell verworfen werden müsste. Da in einzelnen Diagnosen auch deutlichere quantile Abweichungen sichtbar werden können, sollten die betreffenden Teilmodelle jedoch nicht als vollständig assumptionskonform dargestellt werden. Insgesamt spricht die Residualanalyse damit eher für punktuelle Verletzungen einzelner Modellannahmen als für einen flächigen, gravierenden Missfit.


*FRT DHARMa*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)
library(DHARMa)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================================================
# SETTINGS
# =========================================================

set.seed(123)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  x <- x[keep]
  y <- y[keep]

  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x, y))
}

safe_test_p <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("p.value" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  p <- test_obj$p.value
  if (is.null(p) || length(p) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(p[1])
}

safe_test_stat <- function(test_obj) {
  if (is.null(test_obj)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!("statistic" %in% names(test_obj))) return(NA_real_)
  s <- test_obj$statistic
  if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(s[1])
}

safe_kruskal_test <- function(residual, group) {
  keep <- is.finite(residual) & !is.na(group)
  residual <- residual[keep]
  group <- group[keep]

  if (length(residual) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(unique(group)) < 2) return(NULL)

  tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(residual ~ group),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# Erwartet:
# FRT, var1, var2, AOI, nLetters, Participant, Topic, aggr_level
# =========================================================

prep_encap_on_frt_residual_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "FRT", "var1", "var2", "AOI", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "aggr_level"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(FRT), FRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(var1), !is.na(var2), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    mutate(
      var1 = factor(var1),
      var2 = factor(var2),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO CLUSTER
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_on_frt <- function(response = "FRT",
                                              n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "var1 * var2 * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "var1 * var2 + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FIT MIT FEHLER- UND WARNING-CATCHING
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_frt_encap_on <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DHARMa-ANALYSE
# =========================================================

analyse_dharma_frt_encap_on <- function(fit_obj, df, group_var, nsim = 2000) {
  simres <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = fit_obj,
    n = nsim,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  dharma_res <- simres$scaledResiduals
  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df))
  )

  uniform_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testUniformity(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dispersion_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testDispersion(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  outlier_test <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testOutliers(simres),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_dharma <- tryCatch(
    DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  categorical_test_kruskal <- safe_kruskal_test(
    residual = dharma_res,
    group = group_var
  )

  quantiles_warn <- character()
  quantiles_test <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testQuantiles(simres, predictor = df$nLetters),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      quantiles_warn <<- c(quantiles_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  quantiles_error <- if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(quantiles_test)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (inherits(quantiles_test, "error")) {
    quantiles_test <- NULL
  }

  categorical_warn <- character()
  categorical_test_dharma2 <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      DHARMa::testCategorical(simres, catPred = group_var),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      categorical_warn <<- c(categorical_warn, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    }
  )

  categorical_error <- if (inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    conditionMessage(categorical_test_dharma2)
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  if (!inherits(categorical_test_dharma2, "error")) {
    categorical_test_dharma <- categorical_test_dharma2
  }

  dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_dharma)
  dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_dharma)

  if (is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && !is.null(categorical_test_kruskal)) {
    dharma_categorical_stat <- safe_test_stat(categorical_test_kruskal)
    dharma_categorical_p <- safe_test_p(categorical_test_kruskal)
  }

  residual_summary <- tibble(
    n_obs_residuals = nrow(df),
    residual_mean = mean(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_median = median(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_sd = stats::sd(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_min = min(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    residual_max = max(dharma_res, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_lt_0_05 = mean(dharma_res < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_resid_gt_0_95 = mean(dharma_res > 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    cor_resid_fitted = safe_cor(dharma_res, fitted_vals),
    cor_resid_nLetters = safe_cor(dharma_res, df$nLetters),
    dharma_uniformity_stat = safe_test_stat(uniform_test),
    dharma_uniformity_p = safe_test_p(uniform_test),
    dharma_dispersion_stat = safe_test_stat(dispersion_test),
    dharma_dispersion_p = safe_test_p(dispersion_test),
    dharma_outlier_stat = safe_test_stat(outlier_test),
    dharma_outlier_p = safe_test_p(outlier_test),
    dharma_categorical_stat = dharma_categorical_stat,
    dharma_categorical_p = dharma_categorical_p,
    dharma_quantiles_stat = safe_test_stat(quantiles_test),
    dharma_quantiles_p = safe_test_p(quantiles_test),
    dharma_categorical_warning = collapse_unique(categorical_warn),
    dharma_categorical_error = categorical_error,
    dharma_quantiles_warning = collapse_unique(quantiles_warn),
    dharma_quantiles_error = quantiles_error
  )

  plot_data <- tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = dharma_res,
    nLetters = df$nLetters,
    observed = df$FRT
  )

  list(
    simres = simres,
    residual_summary = residual_summary,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    tests = list(
      uniform_test = uniform_test,
      dispersion_test = dispersion_test,
      outlier_test = outlier_test,
      categorical_test_dharma = categorical_test_dharma,
      categorical_test_kruskal = categorical_test_kruskal,
      quantiles_test = quantiles_test
    )
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PROBLEMTYP
# =========================================================

classify_problem_frt_residual <- function(fit_ok,
                                          fit_error,
                                          fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                          fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                          fit_warning_text,
                                          dharma_uniformity_p,
                                          dharma_dispersion_p,
                                          dharma_outlier_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_p,
                                          dharma_quantiles_p,
                                          dharma_categorical_warning,
                                          dharma_quantiles_warning,
                                          dharma_categorical_error,
                                          dharma_quantiles_error) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(
      fit_error,
      fit_warning_text,
      dharma_categorical_warning,
      dharma_quantiles_warning,
      dharma_categorical_error,
      dharma_quantiles_error
    ),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !isTRUE(fit_ok) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 &&
      !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_and_categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_uniformity_p) && dharma_uniformity_p < 0.05 ~
      "uniformity_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_dispersion_p) && dharma_dispersion_p < 0.05 ~
      "dispersion_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_outlier_p) && dharma_outlier_p < 0.05 ~
      "outlier_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_categorical_p) && dharma_categorical_p < 0.05 ~
      "categorical_signal",
    !is.na(dharma_quantiles_p) && dharma_quantiles_p < 0.05 ~
      "quantiles_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("outer Newton did not converge fully|step failure", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "diagnostic_test_warning",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficiency_signal",
    !is.na(fit_warning_text) ~ "warning_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# PLOTFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

plot_frt_residuals_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Residuals vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_frt_residuals_vs_nLetters <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nLetters, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Residuals vs nLetters | ", aggr_label),
      x = "nLetters",
      y = "DHARMa residuals"
    )
}

plot_frt_observed_vs_fitted <- function(plot_data, aggr_label, idx) {
  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = fitted, y = observed)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("[", idx, "/4] FRT Observed vs Fitted | ", aggr_label),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Observed FRT"
    )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_on_frt_residual <- function(df_aggr,
                                                    formula,
                                                    group_var,
                                                    exp_name = "encap_on",
                                                    aggr_i,
                                                    n_aoi_in_cluster,
                                                    nsim = 2000) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_frt_encap_on(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  if (is.null(fit_obj)) {
    summary_tbl <- tibble(
      experiment = exp_name,
      aggr_level = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
      cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
      n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
      n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
      n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
      n_var1 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var1),
      n_var2 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var2),
      n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
      formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
      mutate(
        n_obs_residuals = NA_real_,
        residual_mean = NA_real_,
        residual_median = NA_real_,
        residual_sd = NA_real_,
        residual_min = NA_real_,
        residual_max = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_lt_0_05 = NA_real_,
        prop_resid_gt_0_95 = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_fitted = NA_real_,
        cor_resid_nLetters = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_uniformity_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_dispersion_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_outlier_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_stat = NA_real_,
        dharma_quantiles_p = NA_real_,
        dharma_categorical_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_categorical_error = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_warning = NA_character_,
        dharma_quantiles_error = NA_character_,
        problem_type = "fit_error"
      )

    return(list(
      summary_tbl = summary_tbl,
      simres = NULL,
      plot_data = NULL,
      tests = NULL
    ))
  }

  dharma_res <- analyse_dharma_frt_encap_on(
    fit_obj = fit_obj,
    df = df_aggr,
    group_var = group_var,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  summary_tbl <- tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    cluster_formula_type = ifelse(n_aoi_in_cluster > 1, "var1_var2_AOI", "var1_var2_only"),
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic),
    n_participants = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant),
    n_var1 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var1),
    n_var2 = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$var2),
    n_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI),
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
```
